stemHtml: A pilot is flying at or near VMCA when the temperature decreases and the pressure increases. The pilot will most likely (1) _____ as VMCA gets (2) _____.

options.a: (1) Face difficulties in controlling the aircraft; (2) Higher.
options.c: (1) Experience no change in handling; (2) Unaffected.
options.d: (1) Face difficulties in controlling the aircraft; (2) Lower.
